threat.description: Spoofed sensor readings causing unsafe control

attacker_techniques.description: Adversaries may spoof reporting messages to hide malicious activity.
Adversaries may manipulate I/O image to affect process control.
Adversaries may manipulate operator displays to hide malicious activity.

mitigations: Implement cryptographic authentication for sensor data
Deploy network segmentation to isolate sensor networks
Monitor for anomalous sensor value changes
